name: Riful

She was the number one in the first generation of female Claymores and the youngest ever to awaken. She presents herself as cheerful and polite, though she will instantly discard anyone who gets in the way of her goals. name: Ryoken Kogami
description: Leader of the Knights of Hanoi and the main antagonist in the first season of Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS anime.

name: Sadaharu Kamo
description: __Relatives:__ Keiichiro Kamo (Older Brother). Sadaharu is a close friend of [Jirou Yakuin](https://anilist.co/character/191673/Jirou-Yakuin), being one of the few people Jirou is comfortable being open around. He is paired with Satsuki Kaneyama in their school's Marriage Practical. Sadaharu is portrayed as being a mild mannered and eccentric otaku who enjoys reading manga, watching anime, and playing video games. name: Saki Tenjouin
description: __Height:__ 165 cm The arrogant queen bee of the school, she consistently tries to one-up Lala only to get herself further embarrassed. Eventually she gains a crush on Zastin only to be horrified at the thought that he is in service to Lala, this however has made her very determined to win his heart at any cost.

name: Saki Yamagishi
description: Saki is a clumsy and forgetful girl in their class who used to be Shougo's primary school classmate. She used to be bullied due to her small stature in primary school, and has since depended on others for all matters. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Saori Hidaka
description: Saori is a member of the group [Merm4id](https://anilist.co/staff/301473/Merm4id). Saori started her DJ career in high school, and due to her hardworking nature, she's built up a certain level of technique. She decided to become a DJ after listening to a remix made by a person who worked at the club FROLIC. Her pessimistic thinking held her back from DJing actively, even as a university student. name: Satsuki Minazuki
description: A second-year high school student with a strong sense of justice. Has the ability to see corpses in the future before they happen, and often goes around warning her peers of their impending deaths, only for them to ridicule her and call her "Usotsuki". Despite what hardships she may endure, she still tries to prevent their deaths.

name: Se-Ju Baek
description: Se-Ju is the president of Hello Studio. When you dine together with her, if you order the wine that sounds like her name, she would politely reject it. (Baek Seju can also be translated as "hundred year-old wine")

name: Sei Satou
description: The exact opposite of most of the characters in the show: loud, rough-around-the-edges, she loves doing what she can to push other peoples' buttons. She enjoys mercilessly teasing or being mischievous, conducting most of her antics around Fukuzawa Yumi. Despite being a non-conformist in the ranks of the regular girls in Lillian Jogakuen, Sei is one of the wisest and caring characters on the show. name: Sena Aoi
description: Sena is a third-year student at Suimei Academy. Takumi first encounters her in a hallway at school but quickly excuses himself after facing her ominous glare. She is often seen standing around Shibuya holding a very long sword.

name: Senna
description: __Zanpakutou:__ Mirokumaru Senna is a mysterious young shinigami who [Ichigo Kurosaki](https://anilist.co/character/5/Ichigo-Kurosaki) and [Rukia Kuchiki](https://anilist.co/character/6/Rukia-Kuchiki) end up encountering in the world of the living claiming to be a soul reaper. However, she seems to not know what squad she is from, and her credibility is questionable at best. name: Seong-Hun Cha
description: The secretary of Tae-Mu Kang.

name: Shinon Ogawa
description: A first-year student who founded the Food Culture Research Club and is later assigned as its president. She knows Mako from her childhood, but views her previous nickname "Oshinko" (おしんこ) as an embarrassment. She is outgoing and hyperactive, but mostly forgetful and sometimes careless.She initially formed her club as a means to slack off on campus, though later helps her club pass an initial inspection, and becomes more involved with relevant club activities over time.

name: Suguru Kinniku
description: Born to Mayumi and Sayuri Kinniku, the king and queen of Planet Kinniku on April 1, 1960. Suguru was so stupid looking, even as a child, that on several occasions Mayumi would have an urge to strangle him just from looking at him. On one fateful day, The royal family went on vacation to Earth. While there, a pig snuck on board and got in Suguru's cradle. Mayumi mistook Suguru for the pig and threw him out of the ship. name: Susanna Hopkins
nativeName: スザンナ・ホプキンス
description: One of Ohno's American friends, Susanna (more frequently known as Susie or Sue), is a petite girl with an avid interest in yaoi. Susanna comes off as somewhat harsh and unsociable, and startles the other Genshiken members by using crude anime and manga quotes in Japanese (written in katakana to show her unfamiliarity with the language). searchTerms: スザンナ・ホプキンス

name: Tatsumi
description: The happy go lucky servant to the Kirishiki family. However, there's more to him than meets the eye... ~!Tatsumi is a special kind of vampire called the "Jin-Roh", who can withstand the sunlight unlike other Shikis and is very difficult to kill. He's a sadistic individual and enjoys tormenting his victims. He also acts as the commander of the Shiki-turned villagers. He has a great respect for Sunako.!~

description: __Power:__ Strong Shields and Healing. 1 of 100 mamono children chosen for the battle to decide the next king. Tio's power respond towards how her heart feels.

name: Toru Acura
description: The protagonist is a Saboteur from the village of Acura. He has dark hair and eyes, but in the anime he has dark blue hair. After the downfall of the Gaz Empire and the return of peace, he has lost his way of life. When introduced, he is jobless and poor, and initially mistaken by Chaika to be a bandit attempting to rob her. name: Tsunagu Hidaka
description: Tsunagu is reserved, calm, and doesn't express that much emotion, due to the discrimination that beastmen such as him are put through whenever they enter into human cities. Tsunagu is well aware of the fact that Beastmen have been stereotyped as violent and easily provoked, and so Tsunagu attempts to limit himself from expressing too much emotion, especially not anger.

description: Hard at work studying to become a doctor whilst living at the Amagami Shrine. The current chief priest wants him to marry one of the shrine maidens and become heir to the Amagami Shrine.

name: Vados
description: Vados is Champa's attendant and the older sister of Whis. She is introduced with Champa as they destroy planets across Universe 7, looking for a specific one. Sometime after Goku kills Freeza, they visit Whis and she watches as Champa and Beerus have a "food showdown". Champa is won over by the tastiness of Earth's instant ramen and Vados regrettably informs him that the Earth in their universe (Universe 6) was laid barren thanks to a war waged by humanity.
